default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Tavrn's content strategy and blog updates with GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog formatting needs adjustment for better link visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Content tone and focus aligned with Tavrn's expectations; minor refinements needed](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Team to produce 5 articles/week, focusing on legal precedents and policy information](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [GrowthX to create performance tracking dashboard for published content](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Topics

### Blog Formatting Updates

  - [Internal links not visually distinct; need subtle highlighting (e.g., underline)](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [External links (e.g., government links) valuable for content usefulness](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Tavrn-specific links (AI articles, best practices) should be more visible](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose options for subtle visual signaling](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [Two new articles published and live on Tavrn's site](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Overall tone aligns better with expectations after previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Minor adjustments needed:](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
      - [Americanize spelling (e.g., "maximize" vs. "maximise")](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Reduce emotional language; focus on fact description without commentary](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Reconsider detailed injury descriptions in Starbucks case](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

### Content Direction and Ideas

  - [Focus on current, newsworthy cases for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Include policy information articles (e.g., policy limits per state, medical malpractice caps)](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Consider privacy-related cases (e.g., Pixel Case) and interesting class actions](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [GrowthX team to research cases; Tavrn team to share relevant cases via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [AI prompts for lawyers article ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 articles/week once at steady state](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [16 articles approved to start; 2 more to be drafted by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Analytics Access and Tracking

  - [GrowthX team has access to GSC and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Performance tracking dashboard to be built for published content](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Walkthrough of dashboard planned for next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to propose blog formatting options for link visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Kellie to review articles again for final approval](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [GrowthX to adjust Starbucks case article, summarizing injuries without explicit details](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Team to produce 2 more articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [GrowthX to build performance tracking dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Both teams to continue researching and sharing relevant legal cases for future content](https://fathom.video/share/ys7HrZVh2e2xu9nR2zEvEx24EUKmx9Rb?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

action_items.description: Update blog formatting for internal links (subtle visual signal, e.g. underline). Test options.
Draft 2 more articles by end of week. Include policy limits/caps research. Ensure American spelling (e.g. "maximize").
Review blog posts again (Camp Lejeune, Starbucks Garcia). Focus on legal tone, remove explicit injury details.
Build dashboard to track content performance. Prepare walkthrough for next week's meeting.
Send screenshots of updated blog formatting options to Kellie for approval
